snapshot.scope: Manual review binds public/documentation surfaces, control manifests, verifier code and shared executable schemas; automated gates execute current implementation evidence separately.

reviewers.independence: Independent read-only review audited the exact replacement Dataset ingest candidate. It first blocked an incomplete runtime-union guard, then rechecked the repaired hash, all five P1 boundaries, focused selectors, governance projections, unchanged statuses and fixed budgets; it reported CLEAR and made no edits.

dimensions.summary: The existing Dataset, Pi, Job and Playbook Owners absorb the executable ingest foundation without a new document, top-level UI destination, mode or duplicate lifecycle owner.
Owners agree on preserve-first source evidence, Pi-selected materialization, Dataset Bundle structured truth, deterministic Jobs/Operations and unchanged later-phase query/edit boundaries.
Four exact Dataset evidence claims and six existing partial acceptance projections bind the implemented ingest foundation while Dataset Requirements, Exits and all phase states remain unchanged.

Executable selectors cover bounded CSV/XLSX/SQLite planning, independent validation, deterministic publication, wait/retry/restart and clean cancellation; query, edit and broader recovery remain explicit follow-up.
No Markdown file was added; 55 documents, 3,449 of 3,700 entry words and 1,145,708 of 1,210,000 governed Markdown bytes remain within ratcheted budgets.

verification.evidence: The final exact Dataset ingest candidate passes docs, decisions, UI, independent review, TRC-001 through TRC-005, CON-001 through CON-004, dependencies, fixtures, boundaries, no telemetry, source artifacts, LEN-001 through LEN-005 and all five documentation-quality dimensions.

verification.command: npm run verify:docs && npm run verify:decisions && npm run verify:contracts
verification.evidence: The PRD contract closes at 152/10/11 P0/P1/P2 items, 102 Requirements/capabilities, 144 Builds and 100 Exits; 87 Decisions and all four cross-document contract gates pass.

Semantic lock schema v3 contains 1,137 claims; four Dataset evidence claims are bound, Dataset Requirements and Exits remain planned, and all existing Requirement/Exit statuses and all ten phase states are unchanged.
LEN-001 through LEN-005 pass with 55 Markdown files, 3,449 of 3,700 entry words, 4,601 trace lines, 230,997 trace bytes and 1,145,708 of 1,210,000 governed Markdown bytes.

coordination.taskTitle: Agent-selected Dataset ingest foundation executable evidence
coordination.compatibility: This candidate adds only the bounded CSV/XLSX/SQLite ingest foundation under the already-governed Dataset architecture. It adds no query/edit surface, public Dataset IPC/UI, dependency, phase renumbering or status promotion.
coordination.acknowledgement: Development froze the exact replacement code/test surface after repairing five P1 boundaries and the runtime-union follow-up. Product Planning synchronized only affected Owners and acceptance evidence; independent review cleared the exact replacement candidate.

nonBlockingRisks: Phase 6 Dataset query, explainability and cell/table citation surfaces remain planned.
Phase 7 Dataset view, edit, Activity/Undo and trash lifecycle remain planned.
Parquet and DuckDB require exact dependency, licensing, packaging, no-network/extension and macOS/Windows validation before adoption.
Large-scale and signed-platform evidence remain open.
Strict cross-process CAS/locking, directory-swap TOCTOU and broader Dataset recovery/concurrency remain open.
Backup/restore and future sync must prove Dataset Bundle atomicity and compatibility before status changes.
